description: Limited-time exclusive menu items positioned as 'secret' offerings with specific availability windows and promotional language to create urgency and exclusivity among followers.
structural_recipe: Post features a hidden or exclusive menu item with clear temporal boundaries (specific dates). Include: product name in caps, descriptive flavor copy, emoji indicators (✨, 🔎) to signal exclusivity, exact availability window (e.g., Sep 15-20), call-to-action directing users to locations, and brief product description emphasizing newness or uniqueness.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers respond strongly to scarcity and exclusivity signals. Limited-time offerings create FOMO (fear of missing out) and position the brand as offering premium, curated experiences. Time-bound promotions drive immediate foot traffic and repeat visits. The 'secret' framing appeals to desire for insider status and special knowledge.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure actual availability across all stated locations during promotion window to maintain trust
Verify menu items align with local taste preferences and dietary requirements
Communicate clearly in Arabic if targeting Saudi Arabic-speaking audience, though Spanish caption suggests multi-market content
Account for weekend/weekday patterns in Saudi leisure and dining schedules
